message:
perf: early-break in select_n batch selection when top-N all have zero connections

In LeastConnections and WeightedLeastConnections select_n paths, when the
worst entry in the top-N set already has zero connections, no remaining
endpoint can improve the result. Change from `continue` (which still
iterates the rest) to `break` for an immediate exit.

Also simplify the LeastConnections guard condition: the previous
`last.1 == 0 && count >= last.1` was equivalent to `last.1 == 0` since
count is always >= 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
